nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 朗多尼亚州

nodes.name: Grey-capped flycatcher
nodes.summary: Grey-capped flycatcher（Grey-capped flycatcher，学名 Myiozetetes granadensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联18个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: obscurior, Ecuador | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myiozetetes | species = granadensis | authority = Lawrence, 1862 | range_map = Myiozetetes granadensis map.svg }} The grey-capped flycatcher (Myiozetetes granadensis) is a passerine bird, a member of the large tyrant flycatcher family Tyrannidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, Honduras, Nicaragua, Panama, Peru, and Venezuela.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It ranges from the lower Magdalena River valley in Colombia south though eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into northern Bolivia and from the east side of Colombia's Eastern Andes into southeastern Venezuela's Amazonas and western Bolívar states and in western Brazil's northern Roraima, western Amazonas, and Rondônia states. The grey-capped flycatcher inhabits a variety of humid landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones, most of which are somewhat open
